problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: The key to Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? is Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation — specifically Rhizobium inoculation for — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
